originalTitle: Trump blasts ‘hostile’ Fed and says Warsh ‘has to do what he has to do’ on interest rates
summary: Trump, in the interview, also said he continues to plan to remove Fed governor Lisa Cook from the central bank’s board.
content: Trump, in the interview, also said he continues to plan to remove Fed governor Lisa Cook from the central bank’s board.
chineseTitle: 特朗普抨击“敌对”美联储，并表示沃什在利率问题上“必须做他必须做的事情”
chineseSummary: 特朗普在接受采访时还表示，他继续计划将美联储理事丽莎·库克从美联储董事会中撤职。
chineseContent: 特朗普在接受采访时还表示，他继续计划将美联储理事丽莎·库克从美联储董事会中撤职。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
